title: Salter 112 WHWHDR Mechanical Kitchen Scale - Compact Food Scale with 3KG Capacity, Battery Free Baking Scale, Tare Function, 1L Dishwasher Safe Bowl, Easy Read Clock Face Dial
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
SMALL AND HANDY: Perfect for precise weighing this mini scale has a 3 kg / 6 lb 6 oz capacity so you can accurately measure ingredients using the easy read dial and large digits.
MECHANICAL KITCHEN SCALE: Make cooking fun for your family and create bakes for everyone to enjoy from homemade biscuits and cakes, fresh pizza dough and pie crusts.

NO BATTERIES NEEDED: Don’t worry about running out of batteries as you won’t need any with this food scale it’s always ready to use! This scale comes with a 15-year guarantee so you can keep cooking for years to come.
EASY TO CLEAN: Save time cleaning up and more time making delicious treats as the 1L removable bowl is dishwasher safe for easy clean up after cooking.
NEAT STORAGE: Measuring 24 x 18 cm you can save on precious countertop space by fitting the scale inside the bowl after use for neat storage.
description: This Salter mini mechanical scale won’t leave you wondering where you went wrong in your recipe. With a 3kg / 6lb 6oz capacity, you can precisely measure ingredients thanks to the easy-read dial and large digits. A dishwasher-safe 1L bowl is included to bake for the whole family. Don’t worry about running out of batteries as you won’t need any with this food scale, it’s always ready to use! Measuring 24 x 18cm you can save countertop space by fitting the scale inside the bowl for neat storage.
